name: Hip MRI
description: MRI of the hip for labrum, cartilage, and avascular necrosis evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the hip was performed with T1, T2, and fat-saturated sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Acetabular Labrum
sections.content: Acetabular labrum [is intact / no tear / no degeneration].

sections.name: Articular Cartilage
sections.content: Articular cartilage [is intact / no delamination / no full-thickness defect].

sections.name: Femoral Head
sections.content: Femoral head [normal signal / no AVN changes / no collapse].

impression:
1. No labral tear.
2. No evidence of avascular necrosis.
3. Normal hip MRI.
